endpoints.GET /health: Reports the local gateway and upstream vision-service availability.

request.image_base64: Required base64-encoded PNG, JPEG, or WebP bytes. Data URLs are not accepted.

response.ok: Whether the Day 22 observation guard accepted the vision result.
response.reply: A safe observation sentence or the fixed safe fallback.
response.observation: The validated structured observation, or null when blocked.
response.image: Input and in-memory resized dimensions only.

safety_boundary: The API accepts no player instruction, command text, remote image URL, or server-side file path.
Images are decoded, resized, and re-encoded in memory; uploads are never written to disk.
Only a Day 22 contract-compliant observation can leave the service.
The service does not call the Day 21 command gateway or Mindcraft.
